subject: Computer Networking
title: Browser Developer Tools
description: Learn Browser Developer Tools in one minute.

hook.text: Press F12 and a hidden world opens. DevTools let you inspect, debug, and profile any web page live.

buildup.text: The Elements panel shows live HTML and CSS. Edit styles in real time and see changes instantly.

discovery.text: The Network panel shows every HTTP request: timing, size, status code, and headers. Debug slow loads here.

twist.text: The Console runs JavaScript on the live page. Read variables, call functions, test snippets without reloading.

climax.text: Lighthouse audits performance, accessibility, and SEO. It scores your page and gives fix suggestions.

punchline.text: DevTools turn any browser into a web development lab. Free and built in.

quiz.question: What does the Network panel in DevTools show?
options: All HTTP requests with their timing and status codes
The page's HTML source code only
A list of installed browser extensions
